list.title: Skills
list.emptyBody: Create a skill from scratch or import one from a markdown file or zip archive.

selectPrompt.title: Select a skill
selectPrompt.body: Pick a skill on the left to preview or edit it.

create.title: Create skill
create.subtitle: Skills are reusable instructions appended to an agent's prompt.

fields.name: Name
fields.descriptionHint: Describe what this skill instructs the agent to do — phrase it as a directive ("flag…", "check…"). Used by agents and humans to pick the right skill.
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Flag unbounded queries inside loops as N+1.
fields.bodyHint: This is the text appended to the agent's prompt. Plain text + Markdown only — no code execution.
fields.bodyPlaceholder:
# Rule
Describe the rule the agent should apply…

import.title: Import skill
import.subtitle: Upload a markdown file or a zip archive. We extract the skill body and let you confirm before saving.
import.trustNotice: Imported skills come from outside this workspace. The body becomes part of an agent's prompt — treat third-party skills the same as third-party instructions and review them before enabling.
import.untrustedNotice: Pick a .md or .zip file. We never run anything from the archive — only markdown is extracted; everything else is listed and ignored.
import.bodyHint: You can edit before saving. Stored as plain text — never executed.

fields.name: Name
fields.descriptionHint: Describe what this skill instructs the agent to do — formulate it as a directive.
fields.bodyHint: Editing the body bumps the version (immutable snapshot in skill_versions).

preview.heading: Preview
preview.subheading: Rendered as the reviewing agent receives it.

versions.heading: Versions
versions.subheading: Every body change creates an immutable snapshot. Click a row to view the body.

editor.untrustedNote: This skill was imported. Vet the body before enabling it for an agent — it will be appended to that agent's prompt.
editor.confirmDelete: Delete skill "{name}"? It will be unlinked from every agent that uses it.

agentTab.title: Skills
agentTab.subtitle: Order matters — earlier skills appear earlier in the assembled prompt. Drag to reorder.

empty.title: No skills linked
empty.body: Pick a skill from the catalog to attach it to this agent.
